calendar.matters:
Petition For Attorney Compensation
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Waiver Of Future Accounts (Probate Code Â§2620 And Â§17200)
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geoffrey Lee appeared by telephone for Qingyun Li.

The Court stated that it has no problem with the request for waiver of future of accountings because the bulk of the funds are in a blocked account and that the Trustee has a bond. Mr. Lee addressed the issue of the Dale Law Firm fees, and stated that he believes the firm provided services through 2013 and that he substituted in on October 25, 2013. The Petition for Waiver of Future Accounts and for Attorney Fees was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui. (Not Reported)
